parameters.initialMessages:
PDF Vision Tester

Send a company number to fetch its latest accounts as a PDF, convert the pages to images and run the vision model (qwen2.5vl:7b) with the production extraction prompt:

load 06880902

The reply is the model's raw output. Then chat naturally to interrogate it, e.g.:
Employees looks wrong - the accounts say 704. Which page and table did you read it from?

Each follow-up re-sends the same page images plus the conversation so far, so the model must justify or correct itself.

Commands: reset - clear the session | load <RegNo> or a bare company number - start a new test

options.subtitle: Send a company number to test the PDF vision extraction, then chat to interrogate the figures
options.title: PDF Vision Tester
